title: kronos-semi run manifest v1
description: Schema-versioned metadata describing a single kronos-semi simulation run artifact.

schema_version.description: Version of this manifest schema, following semantic versioning (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH).

engine.description: Metadata identifying the simulation engine that produced this artifact.

version.description: Package version string of the engine.

commit.description: Git commit SHA of the engine source at the time of the run, or 'unknown' if unavailable.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this run, typically '<timestamp>_<name>_<sha7>'.

status.description: Terminal status of the simulation run.

wall_time_s.description: Total wall-clock time consumed by the simulation run, in seconds.

input_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the input JSON bytes used to drive this run.

solver.description: Summary of the solver configuration and convergence outcome. Backend metadata fields (backend_requested, backend_resolved, device, linear_solver, preconditioner, ksp_iters, linear_solve_wall_s) were added in manifest 1.1.0 (M15) and are optional so older readers do not break.

backend.description: PETSc backend and linear solver descriptor (e.g. 'petsc-cpu-mumps', 'petsc-gpu-amgx', 'petsc-gpu-hypre').

backend_requested.description: User-supplied solver.backend value at submission (cpu-mumps, gpu-amgx, gpu-hypre, or auto). Added in manifest 1.1.0 (M15).

backend_resolved.description: Concrete backend resolved at solve time after considering this build's PETSc capabilities. Added in manifest 1.1.0 (M15).

device.description: Compute device used for the linear solve (cpu, cuda, hip). Added in manifest 1.1.0 (M15).

linear_solver.description: User-supplied solver.compute.linear_solver value (auto, gmres, bcgs, cg). Added in manifest 1.1.0 (M15).

preconditioner.description: User-supplied solver.compute.preconditioner value (auto, amgx, hypre-boomeramg, gamg). Added in manifest 1.1.0 (M15).

ksp_iters.description: KSP iteration count from the final Newton step's linear solve. Added in manifest 1.1.0 (M15).

linear_solve_wall_s.description: Wall-clock seconds spent inside the most recent SNES.solve() call (covers Newton outer + linear inner). Added in manifest 1.1.0 (M15).

n_dofs.description: Total number of global degrees of freedom in the primary function space.

n_steps.description: Number of bias/gate steps executed during the run (at least 1 for equilibrium).

converged.description: Whether the final SNES solve converged to within the requested tolerances.

fields.description: List of exported field files, one entry per scalar or vector quantity.

items.description: Metadata for a single exported field.

units.description: SI units of the field values (e.g. 'V', 'm^-3', 'V/m', 'A/m^2').

path.description: Path to the field file relative to the run directory root.

rank.description: Tensor rank of the field: 0 for scalar, 1 for vector, 2 for matrix.

mesh.description: Summary of the mesh used in this simulation.

path.description: Path to the exported mesh XDMF file relative to the run directory root.

dimension.description: Topological dimension of the mesh (1, 2, or 3).

n_cells.description: Total number of mesh cells (elements) across all MPI ranks.

n_vertices.description: Total number of mesh vertices across all MPI ranks.

regions.description: List of named mesh regions (physical groups) tagged in the mesh.

items.description: Metadata for a single tagged mesh region.

name.description: Name of the region as specified in the input JSON.

material.description: Material identifier string for this region (e.g. 'Si', 'SiO2').

tag.description: Integer subdomain tag assigned to this region in the mesh.

sweeps.description: List of bias or gate sweep records. Omitted for equilibrium runs.

items.description: Metadata for a single contact sweep (voltage or gate).

kind.description: Whether this is a voltage (ohmic) sweep or a gate (MOS) sweep.

contact.description: Name of the swept contact as it appears in the input JSON.

path.description: Path to the I-V or Q-V CSV file relative to the run directory root.

n_steps.description: Number of bias steps recorded in the CSV (equals the number of data rows).

bipolar.description: True when the sweep spans both positive and negative applied voltages.

warnings.description: List of non-fatal warning messages emitted during artifact writing.
